from query string.\n37\t#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]\n38\tpub struct DocumentsParams {\n39\t    primaryKey: Option<String>,\n40\t}\n41\t\n42\t/// Task response (Meilisearch-compatible).\n43\t#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]\n44\tpub struct TaskResponse {\n45\t    taskUid: u64,\n46\t    indexUid: String,\n47\t    status: String,\n48\t    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n49\t    error: Option<Value>,\n50\t    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n51\t    #[serde(rename = \"type\")]\n52\t    error_type: Option<String>,\n53\t}\n54\t\n55\t/// Response for write operations.\n56\t#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]\n57\tpub struct DocumentsWriteResponse {\n58\t    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n59\t    taskUid: Option<String>, // Changed to String to hold mtask-<uuid>\n60\t    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n61\t    indexUid: Option<String>,\n62\t    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n63\t    status: Option<String>,\n64\t    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n65\t    error: Option<String>,\n66\t    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n67\t    #[serde(rename = \"type\")]\n68\t    error_type: Option<String>,\n69\t    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n70\t    code: Option<String>,\n71\t    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n72\t    link: Option<String>,\n73\t}\n74\t\n75\t/// Header name for degraded write responses.\n76\tpub const HEADER_MIROIR_DEGRADED: &str = \"X-Miroir-Degraded\";\n77\t\n78\t/// Quorum tracking state for write operations.\n79\t#[derive(Debug, Default)]\n80\tstruct QuorumState {\n81\t    /// Per-group ACK counts: group_id -> successful_ack_count\n82\t    group_acks: HashMap<u32, usize>,\n83\t    /// Per-group total node counts: group_id -> total_nodes_attempted\n84\t    group_totals: HashMap<u32, usize>,\n85\t    /// Groups that met quorum: group_id -> true\n86\t    groups_met_quorum: HashMap<u32, bool>,\n87\t    /// Total degraded groups count\n88\t    degraded_groups: u32,\n89\t}\n90\t\n91\timpl QuorumState {\n92\t    /// Record a write attempt to a node.\n93\t    fn record_attempt(&mut self, group_id: u32, _node_id: &NodeId) {\n94\t        *self.group_totals.entry(group_id).or_insert(0) += 1;\n95\t    }\n96\t\n97\t    /// Record a successful write ACK from a node.\n98\t    fn record_success(&mut self, group_id: u32, _node_id: &NodeId) {\n99\t        *self.group_acks.entry(group_id).or_insert(0) += 1;\n100\t    }\n101\t\n102\t    /// Record a failed write attempt from a node.\n103\t    fn record_failure(&mut self, _group_id: u32) {\n104\t        // Track that this group had a failure\n105\t        // Degraded is determined after checking quorum\n106\t    }\n107\t\n108\t    /// Check if a group has met quorum: floor(RF/2) + 1 ACKs required.\n109\t    fn check_group_quorum(&mut self, group_id: u32, rf: usize) -> bool {\n110\t        let acks = *self.group_acks.get(&group_id).unwrap_or(&0);\n111\t        let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n112\t        let met = acks >= quorum;\n113\t        *self.groups_met_quorum.entry(group_id).or_insert(false) = met;\n114\t        met\n115\t    }\n116\t\n117\t    /// Count how many groups met quorum.\n118\t    fn count_quorum_groups(&self) -> usize {\n119\t        self.groups_met_quorum.values().filter(|&&v| v).count()\n120\t    }\n121\t\n122\t    /// Count degraded groups (groups that exist but didn't meet quorum).\n123\t    fn count_degraded_groups(&mut self, replica_group_count: u32, rf: usize) -> u32 {\n124\t        let mut degraded = 0u32;\n125\t        for group_id in 0..replica_group_count {\n126\t            if !self.check_group_quorum(group_id, rf) {\n127\t                // Only count as degraded if we attempted to write to this group\n128\t                if self.group_totals.contains_key(&group_id) {\n129\t                    degraded += 1;\n130\t                }\n131\t            }\n132\t        }\n133\t        degraded\n134\t    }\n135\t}\n136\t\n137\t/// Build router for document endpoints.\n138\tpub fn router<S>() -> Router<S>\n139\twhere\n140\t    S: Clone + Send + Sync + 'static,\n141\t{\n142\t    Router::new()\n143\t        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::post(post_documents))\n144\t        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::put(put_documents))\n145\t        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::delete(delete_documents))\n146\t        .route(\"/:id\", axum::routing::delete(delete_document_by_id))\n147\t}\n148\t\n149\t/// POST /indexes/{uid}/documents - Add documents.\n150\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %index))]\n151\tasync fn post_documents(\n152\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n153\t    Query(params): Query<DocumentsParams>,\n154\t    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n155\t    session_id_wrapper: OptionalSessionId,\n156\t    headers: axum::http::HeaderMap,\n157\t    Json(documents): Json<Vec<Value>>,\n158\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n159\t    // Extract session ID from OptionalSessionId extractor (set by session_pinning_middleware)\n160\t    let sid: Option<String> = session_id_wrapper.0.and_then(|sid| {\n161\t        if sid.0.is_empty() { None } else { Some(sid.0.clone()) }\n162\t    });\n163\t\n164\t    // Extract idempotency key (plan §13.10)\n165\t    let idempotency_key = headers\n166\t        .get(\"Idempotency-Key\")\n167\t        .and_then(|v| v.to_str().ok())\n168\t        .map(|s| s.to_string());\n169\t\n170\t    write_documents_impl(index, params.primaryKey, documents, &state, sid, idempotency_key).await\n171\t}\n172\t\n173\t/// PUT /indexes/{uid}/documents - Replace documents.\n174\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %index))]\n175\tasync fn put_documents(\n176\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n177\t    Query(params): Query<DocumentsParams>,\n178\t    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n179\t    OptionalSessionId(session_id): OptionalSessionId,\n180\t    headers: axum::http::HeaderMap,\n181\t    Json(documents): Json<Vec<Value>>,\n182\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n183\t    let sid: Option<String> = session_id.and_then(|sid| {\n184\t        if sid.0.is_empty() { None } else { Some(sid.0.clone()) }\n185\t    });\n186\t\n187\t    // Extract idempotency key (plan §13.10)\n188\t    let idempotency_key = headers\n189\t        .get(\"Idempotency-Key\")\n190\t        .and_then(|v| v.to_str().ok())\n191\t        .map(|s| s.to_string());\n192\t\n193\t    write_documents_impl(index, params.primaryKey, documents, &state, sid, idempotency_key).await\n194\t}\n195\t\n196\t/// DELETE /indexes/{uid}/documents - Delete by IDs or filter.\n197\tasync fn delete_documents(\n198\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n199\t    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n200\t    OptionalSessionId(session_id): OptionalSessionId,\n201\t    headers: axum::http::HeaderMap,\n202\t    Json(body): Json<Value>,\n203\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n204\t    let sid: Option<String> = session_id.and_then(|sid| {\n205\t        if sid.0.is_empty() { None } else { Some(sid.0.clone()) }\n206\t    });\n207\t\n208\t    // Extract idempotency key (plan §13.10)\n209\t    let idempotency_key = headers\n210\t        .get(\"Idempotency-Key\")\n211\t        .and_then(|v| v.to_str().ok())\n212\t        .map(|s| s.to_string());\n213\t\n214\t    // Try to parse as delete by filter first\n215\t    if let Some(filter) = body.get(\"filter\") {\n216\t        let req = DeleteByFilterRequest {\n217\t            index_uid: index.clone(),\n218\t            filter: filter.clone(),\n219\t            origin: None, // Client write\n220\t        };\n221\t        return delete_by_filter_impl(index, req, &state, sid, idempotency_key).await;\n222\t    }\n223\t\n224\t    // Try to parse as delete by IDs\n225\t    if let Some(ids) = body.get(\"ids\").and_then(|v| v.as_array()) {\n226\t        let ids: Vec<String> = ids\n227\t            .iter()\n228\t            .filter_map(|v| v.as_str().map(|s| s.to_string()))\n229\t            .collect();\n230\t        if !ids.is_empty() {\n231\t            let req = DeleteByIdsRequest {\n232\t                index_uid: index.clone(),\n233\t                ids,\n234\t                origin: None, // Client write\n235\t            };\n236\t            return delete_by_ids_impl(index, req, &state, sid, idempotency_key).await;\n237\t        }\n238\t    }\n239\t\n240\t    // If we get here, the request body is malformed\n241\t    Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n242\t        MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n243\t        \"delete request must include either 'filter' or 'ids' field\",\n244\t    ))\n245\t}\n246\t\n247\t/// DELETE /indexes/{uid}/documents/{id} - Delete single document by ID.\n248\tasync fn delete_document_by_id(\n249\t    Path((index, id)): Path<(String, String)>,\n250\t    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n251\t    OptionalSessionId(session_id): OptionalSessionId,\n252\t    headers: axum::http::HeaderMap,\n253\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n254\t    let sid: Option<String> = session_id.and_then(|sid| {\n255\t        if sid.0.is_empty() { None } else { Some(sid.0.clone()) }\n256\t    });\n257\t\n258\t    // Extract idempotency key (plan §13.10)\n259\t    let idempotency_key = headers\n260\t        .get(\"Idempotency-Key\")\n261\t        .and_then(|v| v.to_str().ok())\n262\t        .map(|s| s.to_string());\n263\t\n264\t    let req = DeleteByIdsRequest {\n265\t        index_uid: index.clone(),\n266\t        ids: vec![id],\n267\t        origin: None, // Client write\n268\t    };\n269\t    delete_by_ids_impl(index, req, &state, sid, idempotency_key).await\n270\t}\n271\t\n272\t/// Implementation for write documents (POST/PUT).\n273\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %index, session_id))]\n274\tasync fn write_documents_impl(\n275\t    index: String,\n276\t    primary_key: Option<String>,\n277\t    mut documents: Vec<Value>,\n278\t    state: &AppState,\n279\t    session_id: Option<String>,\n280\t    idempotency_key: Option<String>,\n281\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n282\t    if documents.is_empty() {\n283\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n284\t            MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n285\t            \"cannot write empty document batch\",\n286\t        ));\n287\t    }\n288\t\n289\t    // 0.5. Check idempotency cache (plan §13.10)\n290\t    if state.config.idempotency.enabled {\n291\t        if let Some(ref key) = idempotency_key {\n292\t            // Compute SHA256 hash of the request body\n293\t            use sha2::{Digest, Sha256};\n294\t            let body_hash = format!(\"{:x}\", Sha256::digest(serde_json::to_string(&documents).unwrap_or_default()));\n295\t\n296\t            // Check cache\n297\t            match state.idempotency_cache.check(key, &body_hash).await {\n298\t                Ok(Some(cached_mtask_id)) => {\n299\t                    // Idempotency hit: return cached mtask ID\n300\t                    state.metrics.inc_idempotency_hit(\"dedup\");\n301\t                    return build_response_with_degraded_header(\n302\t                        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n303\t                            taskUid: Some(cached_mtask_id),\n304\t                            indexUid: Some(index.clone()),\n305\t                            status: Some(\"enqueued\".to_string()),\n306\t                            error: None,\n307\t                            error_type: None,\n308\t                            code: None,\n309\t                            link: None,\n310\t                        },\n311\t                        0, // No degraded groups for cached response\n312\t                    );\n313\t                }\n314\t                Ok(None) => {\n315\t                    // Cache miss - proceed with processing\n316\t                    state.metrics.inc_idempotency_hit(\"miss\");\n317\t                }\n318\t                Err(miroir_core::error::MiroirError::IdempotencyKeyReused) => {\n319\t                    // Key exists but body hash differs\n320\t                    state.metrics.inc_idempotency_hit(\"conflict\");\n321\t                    return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n322\t                        MiroirCode::IdempotencyKeyReused,\n323\t                        \"idempotency key was already used with a different request body\",\n324\t                    ));\n325\t                }\n326\t                Err(e) => {\n327\t                    // Other error - log but proceed (best-effort caching)\n328\t                    tracing::warn!(error = %e, \"idempotency cache check failed, proceeding with write\");\n329\t                    state.metrics.inc_idempotency_hit(\"miss\");\n330\t                }\n331\t            }\n332\t        }\n333\t    }\n334\t\n335\t    // 1. Resolve alias to concrete index UID (plan §13.7)\n336\t    // Aliases are resolved before any processing; writes to multi-target aliases are rejected\n337\t    let index_uid = if state.config.aliases.enabled {\n338\t        // Check if the index is an alias\n339\t        let resolved = state.alias_registry.resolve(&index).await;\n340\t        if resolved != vec![index.clone()] {\n341\t            // It was an alias\n342\t            // Check if it's a multi-target alias (read-only, ILM-managed)\n343\t            if state.alias_registry.is_multi_target_alias(&index).await {\n344\t                return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n345\t                    MiroirCode::MultiAliasNotWritable,\n346\t                    format!(\n347\t                        \"alias '{}' is a multi-target alias and is read-only (managed by ILM); writes must go to the concrete index or the write alias\",\n348\t                        index\n349\t                    ),\n350\t                ));\n351\t            }\n352\t            // Single-target alias: record resolution metric and use the target\n353\t            state.metrics.inc_alias_resolution(&index);\n354\t            resolved.into_iter().next().unwrap_or_else(|| index.clone())\n355\t        } else {\n356\t            // Not an alias, use the index name as-is\n357\t            index.clone()\n358\t        }\n359\t    } else {\n360\t        index.clone()\n361\t    };\n362\t\n363\t    // 1. Extract primary key from first document if not provided\n364\t    let primary_key = primary_key.or_else(|| {\n365\t        documents\n366\t            .first()\n367\t            .and_then(|doc| extract_primary_key(doc))\n368\t    });\n369\t\n370\t    let primary_key = primary_key.ok_or_else(|| {\n371\t        MeilisearchError::new(\n372\t            MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n373\t            format!(\"primary key required for index `{}`\", index),\n374\t        )\n375\t    })?;\n376\t\n377\t    // 2. Validate all documents have the primary key and check for reserved field\n378\t    let anti_entropy_enabled = state.config.anti_entropy.enabled;\n379\t    let updated_at_field = &state.config.anti_entropy.updated_at_field;\n380\t    let ttl_enabled = state.config.ttl.enabled;\n381\t    let expires_at_field = &state.config.ttl.expires_at_field;\n382\t\n383\t    for (i, doc) in documents.iter().enumerate() {\n384\t        // Check for reserved field BEFORE checking primary key (per acceptance criteria)\n385\t        // _miroir_shard is ALWAYS reserved (plan §5)\n386\t        if doc.get(\"_miroir_shard\").is_some() {\n387\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n388\t                MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n389\t                \"document contains reserved field `_miroir_shard`\",\n390\t            ));\n391\t        }\n392\t\n393\t        // _miroir_updated_at is reserved ONLY when anti_entropy.enabled: true (plan §5, §13.8)\n394\t        if anti_entropy_enabled && doc.get(updated_at_field).is_some() {\n395\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n396\t                MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n397\t                format!(\"document contains reserved field `{}` (reserved when anti_entropy.enabled: true)\", updated_at_field),\n398\t            ));\n399\t        }\n400\t\n401\t        // _miroir_expires_at is reserved ONLY when ttl.enabled: true (plan §5, §13.14)\n402\t        // When reserved, clients cannot SET it; the orchestrator controls it. When disabled,\n403\t        // client values pass through end-to-end.\n404\t        if ttl_enabled && doc.get(expires_at_field).is_some() {\n405\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n406\t                MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n407\t                format!(\"document contains reserved field `{}` (reserved when ttl.enabled: true)\", expires_at_field),\n408\t            ));\n409\t        }\n410\t\n411\t        if doc.get(&primary_key).is_none() {\n412\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n413\t                MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n414\t                format!(\n415\t                    \"document at index {} missing primary key field `{}`\",\n416\t                    i, primary_key\n417\t                ),\n418\t            ));\n419\t        }\n420\t    }\n421\t\n422\t    // 3. Inject _miroir_shard and _miroir_updated_at into each document\n423\t    let topology = state.topology.read().await;\n424\t    let shard_count = topology.shards;\n425\t    let rf = topology.rf();\n426\t    let replica_group_count = topology.replica_group_count();\n427\t\n428\t    // Get current timestamp in milliseconds since epoch for _miroir_updated_at stamping\n429\t    let now_ms = if anti_entropy_enabled {\n430\t        Some(\n431\t            std::time::SystemTime::now()\n432\t                .duration_since(std::time::UNIX_EPOCH)\n433\t                .unwrap_or_default()\n434\t                .as_millis() as u64\n435\t        )\n436\t    } else {\n437\t        None\n438\t    };\n439\t\n440\t    for doc in &mut documents {\n441\t        if let Some(pk_value) = doc.get(&primary_key).and_then(|v| v.as_str()) {\n442\t            let shard_id = shard_for_key(pk_value, shard_count);\n443\t            doc[\"_miroir_shard\"] = serde_json::json!(shard_id);\n444\t        }\n445\t\n446\t        // Stamp _miroir_updated_at when anti_entropy is enabled (plan §13.8)\n447\t        // This happens AFTER reserved field validation, so orchestrator-controlled injection is allowed\n448\t        if let Some(timestamp) = now_ms {\n449\t            doc[updated_at_field] = serde_json::json!(timestamp);\n450\t        }\n451\t    }\n452\t\n453\t    // 4. Group documents by target nodes (per-batch grouping for efficient fan-out)\n454\t    let node_documents = group_documents_by_shard(&documents, &primary_key, &topology)?;\n455\t\n456\t    // 5. Fan out to nodes and track quorum\n457\t    let client = HttpClient::new(\n458\t        state.config.node_master_key.clone(),\n459\t        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n460\t    );\n461\t\n462\t    let mut quorum_state = QuorumState::default();\n463\t    let mut node_task_uids: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n464\t\n465\t    // For each shard, write to all RF nodes in each replica group (with dual-write support)\n466\t    for (shard_id, docs) in node_documents {\n467\t        // Get migration coordinator reference for dual-write detection\n468\t        let migration_coordinator = state.migration_coordinator.as_ref().map(|c| {\n469\t            // We need a read lock on the coordinator\n470\t            tokio::task::block_in_place(|| {\n471\t                tokio::runtime::Handle::current().block_on(async {\n472\t                    c.read().await\n473\t                })\n474\t            })\n475\t        });\n476\t\n477\t        // Use migration-aware routing\n478\t        let targets = write_targets_with_migration(\n479\t            shard_id,\n480\t            &topology,\n481\t            migration_coordinator.as_deref(),\n482\t        );\n483\t\n484\t        if targets.is_empty() {\n485\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n486\t                MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n487\t                format!(\"no available nodes for shard {}\", shard_id),\n488\t            ));\n489\t        }\n490\t\n491\t        // Track which groups we're targeting for this shard\n492\t\n493\t        for node_id in targets {\n494\t            let node = topology\n495\t                .node(&node_id)\n496\t                .ok_or_else(|| MeilisearchError::new(MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable, \"node not found in topology\"))?;\n497\t\n498\t            let group_id = node.replica_group;\n499\t            quorum_state.record_attempt(group_id, &node_id);\n500\t\n501\t            let req = WriteRequest {\n502\t                index_uid: index_uid.clone(),\n503\t                documents: docs.clone(),\n504\t                primary_key: Some(primary_key.clone()),\n505\t                origin: None, // Client write\n506\t            };\n507\t\n508\t            match client.write_documents(&node_id, &node.address, &req).await {\n509\t                Ok(resp) if resp.success => {\n510\t                    quorum_state.record_success(group_id, &node_id);\n511\t                    if let Some(task_uid) = resp.task_uid {\n512\t                        node_task_uids.insert(node_id.as_str().to_string(), task_uid);\n513\t                    }\n514\t                }\n515\t                Ok(resp) => {\n516\t                    // Non-success response (validation error, etc.)\n517\t                    return Ok(build_json_error_response(build_error_response(resp)));\n518\t                }\n519\t                Err(_) => {\n520\t                    quorum_state.record_failure(group_id);\n521\t                }\n522\t            }\n523\t        }\n524\t    }\n525\t\n526\t    // 6. Apply two-rule quorum logic\n527\t    let degraded_groups = quorum_state.count_degraded_groups(replica_group_count, rf);\n528\t    let quorum_groups = quorum_state.count_quorum_groups();\n529\t\n530\t    // Write success if at least one group met quorum\n531\t    if quorum_groups == 0 {\n532\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n533\t            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n534\t            \"no replica group met quorum\",\n535\t        ));\n536\t    }\n537\t\n538\t    // 6.5. Find the first group to reach quorum (for session pinning, plan §13.6)\n539\t    // Groups are checked in ascending order, so the first one with quorum is the first\n540\t    let first_quorum_group = (0..replica_group_count)\n541\t        .find(|&group_id| {\n542\t            let acks = *quorum_state.group_acks.get(&group_id).unwrap_or(&0);\n543\t            let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n544\t            acks >= quorum\n545\t        })\n546\t        .unwrap_or(0); // Default to group 0 if somehow no quorum (shouldn't happen here)\n547\t\n548\t    // 7. Register Miroir task with collected node task UIDs\n549\t    let miroir_task = state\n550\t        .task_registry\n551\t        .register_with_metadata(\n552\t            node_task_uids.clone(),\n553\t            Some(index_uid.clone()),\n554\t            Some(\"documentAdditionOrUpdate\".to_string()),\n555\t        )\n556\t        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n557\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n558\t            format!(\"failed to register task: {}\", e),\n559\t        ))?;\n560\t\n561\t    // 7.5. Record session pinning if session header present (plan §13.6)\n562\t    if let (Some(ref sid), true) = (&session_id, state.session_manager.is_enabled()) {\n563\t        if let Err(e) = state.session_manager.record_write_with_quorum(\n564\t            sid,\n565\t            miroir_task.miroir_id.clone(),\n566\t            first_quorum_group,\n567\t        ).await {\n568\t            // Log error but don't fail the write - session pinning is best-effort\n569\t            tracing::error!(\n570\t                session_id = %sid,\n571\t                error = %e,\n572\t                \"failed to record session pinning for write\"\n573\t            );\n574\t        }\n575\t    }\n576\t\n577\t    // 7.6. Insert into idempotency cache if key was provided (plan §13.10)\n578\t    if state.config.idempotency.enabled {\n579\t        if let Some(ref key) = idempotency_key {\n580\t            use sha2::{Digest, Sha256};\n581\t            let body_hash = format!(\"{:x}\", Sha256::digest(serde_json::to_string(&documents).unwrap_or_default()));\n582\t            state.idempotency_cache.insert(\n583\t                key.clone(),\n584\t                body_hash,\n585\t                miroir_task.miroir_id.clone(),\n586\t            ).await;\n587\t            // Update cache size metric\n588\t            state.metrics.set_idempotency_cache_size(state.idempotency_cache.size().await as u64);\n589\t        }\n590\t    }\n591\t\n592\t    // Build success response with degraded header and mtask ID\n593\t    build_response_with_degraded_header(\n594\t        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n595\t            taskUid: Some(miroir_task.miroir_id),\n596\t            indexUid: Some(index_uid.clone()),\n597\t            status: Some(\"enqueued\".to_string()),\n598\t            error: None,\n599\t            error_type: None,\n600\t            code: None,\n601\t            link: None,\n602\t        },\n603\t        degraded_groups,\n604\t    )\n605\t}\n606\t\n607\t/// Implementation for delete by IDs.\n608\tasync fn delete_by_ids_impl(\n609\t    index: String,\n610\t    req: DeleteByIdsRequest,\n611\t    state: &AppState,\n612\t    session_id: Option<String>,\n613\t    idempotency_key: Option<String>,\n614\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n615\t    if req.ids.is_empty() {\n616\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n617\t            MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n618\t            \"cannot delete empty ID list\",\n619\t        ));\n620\t    }\n621\t\n622\t    // 0.5. Check idempotency cache (plan §13.10)\n623\t    if state.config.idempotency.enabled {\n624\t        if let Some(ref key) = idempotency_key {\n625\t            use sha2::{Digest, Sha256};\n626\t            let body_hash = format!(\"{:x}\", Sha256::digest(serde_json::to_string(&req).unwrap_or_default()));\n627\t\n628\t            match state.idempotency_cache.check(key, &body_hash).await {\n629\t                Ok(Some(cached_mtask_id)) => {\n630\t                    state.metrics.inc_idempotency_hit(\"dedup\");\n631\t                    return build_response_with_degraded_header(\n632\t                        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n633\t                            taskUid: Some(cached_mtask_id),\n634\t                            indexUid: Some(index.clone()),\n635\t                            status: Some(\"enqueued\".to_string()),\n636\t                            error: None,\n637\t                            error_type: None,\n638\t                            code: None,\n639\t                            link: None,\n640\t                        },\n641\t                        0,\n642\t                    );\n643\t                }\n644\t                Ok(None) => {\n645\t                    state.metrics.inc_idempotency_hit(\"miss\");\n646\t                }\n647\t                Err(miroir_core::error::MiroirError::IdempotencyKeyReused) => {\n648\t                    state.metrics.inc_idempotency_hit(\"conflict\");\n649\t                    return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n650\t                        MiroirCode::IdempotencyKeyReused,\n651\t                        \"idempotency key was already used with a different request body\",\n652\t                    ));\n653\t                }\n654\t                Err(e) => {\n655\t                    tracing::warn!(error = %e, \"idempotency cache check failed, proceeding with delete\");\n656\t                    state.metrics.inc_idempotency_hit(\"miss\");\n657\t                }\n658\t            }\n659\t        }\n660\t    }\n661\t\n662\t    // Resolve alias to concrete index UID (plan §13.7)\n663\t    let index_uid = if state.config.aliases.enabled {\n664\t        let resolved = state.alias_registry.resolve(&index).await;\n665\t        if resolved != vec![index.clone()] {\n666\t            // It was an alias - check if it's a multi-target alias (read-only)\n667\t            if state.alias_registry.is_multi_target_alias(&index).await {\n668\t                return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n669\t                    MiroirCode::MultiAliasNotWritable,\n670\t                    format!(\n671\t                        \"alias '{}' is a multi-target alias and is read-only (managed by ILM); deletes must go to the concrete index or the write alias\",\n672\t                        index\n673\t                    ),\n674\t                ));\n675\t            }\n676\t            // Single-target alias: record resolution metric and use the target\n677\t            state.metrics.inc_alias_resolution(&index);\n678\t            resolved.into_iter().next().unwrap_or_else(|| index.clone())\n679\t        } else {\n680\t            index.clone()\n681\t        }\n682\t    } else {\n683\t        index.clone()\n684\t    };\n685\t\n686\t    let topology = state.topology.read().await;\n687\t    let rf = topology.rf();\n688\t    let replica_group_count = topology.replica_group_count();\n689\t\n690\t    // Group IDs by target shard for independent per-shard routing\n691\t    let mut shard_ids: HashMap<u32, Vec<String>> = HashMap::new();\n692\t    for id in &req.ids {\n693\t        let shard_id = shard_for_key(id, topology.shards);\n694\t        shard_ids.entry(shard_id).or_default().push(id.clone());\n695\t    }\n696\t\n697\t    let client = HttpClient::new(\n698\t        state.config.node_master_key.clone(),\n699\t        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n700\t    );\n701\t\n702\t    let mut quorum_state = QuorumState::default();\n703\t    let mut node_task_uids: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n704\t\n705\t    // For each shard, write to all RF nodes in each replica group\n706\t    for (shard_id, ids) in shard_ids {\n707\t        let targets = miroir_core::router::write_targets(shard_id, &topology);\n708\t\n709\t        if targets.is_empty() {\n710\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n711\t                MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n712\t                format!(\"no available nodes for shard {}\", shard_id),\n713\t            ));\n714\t        }\n715\t\n716\t        for node_id in targets {\n717\t            let node = topology\n718\t                .node(&node_id)\n719\t                .ok_or_else(|| MeilisearchError::new(MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable, \"node not found in topology\"))?;\n720\t\n721\t            let group_id = node.replica_group;\n722\t            quorum_state.record_attempt(group_id, &node_id);\n723\t\n724\t            let delete_req = DeleteByIdsRequest {\n725\t                index_uid: index_uid.clone(),\n726\t                ids: ids.clone(),\n727\t                origin: None, // Client write\n728\t            };\n729\t\n730\t            match client.delete_documents(&node_id, &node.address, &delete_req).await {\n731\t                Ok(resp) if resp.success => {\n732\t                    quorum_state.record_success(group_id, &node_id);\n733\t                    if let Some(task_uid) = resp.task_uid {\n734\t                        node_task_uids.insert(node_id.as_str().to_string(), task_uid);\n735\t                    }\n736\t                }\n737\t                Ok(resp) => {\n738\t                    return Ok(build_json_error_response(build_error_response(resp)));\n739\t                }\n740\t                Err(_) => {\n741\t                    quorum_state.record_failure(group_id);\n742\t                }\n743\t            }\n744\t        }\n745\t    }\n746\t\n747\t    // Apply two-rule quorum logic\n748\t    let degraded_groups = quorum_state.count_degraded_groups(replica_group_count, rf);\n749\t    let quorum_groups = quorum_state.count_quorum_groups();\n750\t\n751\t    // Write success if at least one group met quorum\n752\t    if quorum_groups == 0 {\n753\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n754\t            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n755\t            \"no replica group met quorum\",\n756\t        ));\n757\t    }\n758\t\n759\t    // Find the first group to reach quorum (for session pinning, plan §13.6)\n760\t    let first_quorum_group = (0..replica_group_count)\n761\t        .find(|&group_id| {\n762\t            let acks = *quorum_state.group_acks.get(&group_id).unwrap_or(&0);\n763\t            let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n764\t            acks >= quorum\n765\t        })\n766\t        .unwrap_or(0);\n767\t\n768\t    // Register Miroir task with collected node task UIDs\n769\t    let miroir_task = state\n770\t        .task_registry\n771\t        .register_with_metadata(\n772\t            node_task_uids.clone(),\n773\t            Some(index.clone()),\n774\t            Some(\"documentDeletion\".to_string()),\n775\t        )\n776\t        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n777\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n778\t            format!(\"failed to register task: {}\", e),\n779\t        ))?;\n780\t\n781\t    // Record session pinning if session header present (plan §13.6)\n782\t    if let (Some(ref sid), true) = (&session_id, state.session_manager.is_enabled()) {\n783\t        if let Err(e) = state.session_manager.record_write_with_quorum(\n784\t            sid,\n785\t            miroir_task.miroir_id.clone(),\n786\t            first_quorum_group,\n787\t        ).await {\n788\t            tracing::error!(\n789\t                session_id = %sid,\n790\t                error = %e,\n791\t                \"failed to record session pinning for delete\"\n792\t            );\n793\t        }\n794\t    }\n795\t\n796\t    // Insert into idempotency cache if key was provided (plan §13.10)\n797\t    if state.config.idempotency.enabled {\n798\t        if let Some(ref key) = idempotency_key {\n799\t            use sha2::{Digest, Sha256};\n800\t            let body_hash = format!(\"{:x}\", Sha256::digest(serde_json::to_string(&req).unwrap_or_default()));\n801\t            state.idempotency_cache.insert(\n802\t                key.clone(),\n803\t                body_hash,\n804\t                miroir_task.miroir_id.clone(),\n805\t            ).await;\n806\t            state.metrics.set_idempotency_cache_size(state.idempotency_cache.size().await as u64);\n807\t        }\n808\t    }\n809\t\n810\t    build_response_with_degraded_header(\n811\t        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n812\t            taskUid: Some(miroir_task.miroir_id),\n813\t            indexUid: Some(index.clone()),\n814\t            status: Some(\"enqueued\".to_string()),\n815\t            error: None,\n816\t            error_type: None,\n817\t            code: None,\n818\t            link: None,\n819\t        },\n820\t        degraded_groups,\n821\t    )\n822\t}\n823\t\n824\t/// Implementation for delete by filter (broadcast to all nodes).\n825\tasync fn Option<String>,\n831\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n832\t    // 0.5. Check idempotency cache (plan §13.10)\n833\t    if state.config.idempotency.enabled {\n834\t        if let Some(ref key) = idempotency_key {\n835\t            use sha2::{Digest, Sha256};\n836\t            let body_hash = format!(\"{:x}\", Sha256::digest(serde_json::to_string(&req).unwrap_or_default()));\n837\t\n838\t            match state.idempotency_cache.check(key, &body_hash).await {\n839\t                Ok(Some(cached_mtask_id)) => {\n840\t                    state.metrics.inc_idempotency_hit(\"dedup\");\n841\t                    return build_response_with_degraded_header(\n842\t                        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n843\t                            taskUid: Some(cached_mtask_id),\n844\t                            indexUid: Some(index.clone()),\n845\t                     link: None,\n850\t                        },\n851\t                        0,\n852\t                    );\n853\t                }\n854\t                Ok(None) => {\n855\t                    state.metrics.inc_idempotency_hit(\"miss\");\n856\t                }\n857\t                Err(miroir_core::error::MiroirError::IdempotencyKeyReused) => {\n858\t           }\n869\t        }\n870\t    }\n871\t\n872\t    let topology = state.topology.read().await;\n873\t    let rf = topology.rf();\n874\t    let replica_group_count = );\n880\t\n881\t    let mut quorum_state = QuorumState::default();\n882\t    let mut node_task_uids: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n883\t\n884\t    // Broadcast to all nodes (cannot shard-route for filters)\n885\t    for node in topology.nodes() {\n886\t        let group_id = node.replica_group;\n887\t        quorum_state.record_attempt(group_id, &node.id);\n888\t\n889\t task_uid);\n897\t                }\n898\t            }\n899\t            Ok(resp) => {\n900\t                return Ok(build_json_error_response(build_error_response(resp)));\n901\t            }\n902\t            Err(_) => {\n903\t                quorum_state.record_failure(group_id);\n904\t            }\n905\t        }\n906\t    }\n907\t\n908\t    // Apply two-rule quorum logic\n909\t    let degraded_groups = quorum_state.count_degraded_groups(replica_group_count, rf);\n910\t    let quorum_groups = quorum_state.count_quorum_groups();\n911\t\n912\t    // Write success if at least one group met quorum\n913\t    if quorum_groups == 0 {\n914\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n915\t            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n916\t            \"no replica group met quorum\",\n917\t       }\n955\t    }\n956\t\n957\t    build_response_with_degraded_header(\n958\t        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n959\t            taskUid: Some(miroir_task.miroir_id),\n960\t            indexUid: None,\n966\t        },\n967\t        degraded_groups,\n968\t    )\n969\t}\n970\t\n971\t/// Extract primary key from a document by checking common field names.\n972\t///\n973\t/// Tries fields in order: id, pk, key, _id.\n974\tfn extract_primary_key(doc: &Value) -> Option<String> {\n975\t    [\"id\", \"pk\", \"key\", \"_id\"]\n976\t        .iter()\n977\t        .find(|&&key| doc.get(key).is_some())\n978\t        .map(|&s| s.to_string())\n979\t}\n980\t\n981\t/// Group documents by their target shard for fan-out optimization.\n982\t///\n983\t/// Returns a map of shard_id -> documents to send to that shard.\n984\t/// The caller then fans out each shard's documents to all RF nodes in each group.\n985\t///\n986\t/// This per-batch grouping minimizes HTTP fan-out count (critical at scale).\n987\tfn group_documents_by_shard(\n988\t    documents: &[Value],\n989\t    primary_key: &str,\n990\t    topology: &Topology,\n991\t) -> std::result::Result<HashMap<u32, Vec<Value>>, MeilisearchError> {\n992\t    let mut shard_documents: HashMap<u32, Vec<Value>> = HashMap::new();\n993\t\n994\t    for doc in documents {\n995\t        let pk_value = doc\n996\t            .get(primary_key)\n997\t            .and_then(|v| v.as_str())\n998\t            .ok_or_else(|| {\n999\t                MeilisearchError::new(\n1000\t                    MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n1001\t                    \"primary key value must be a string\",\n1002\t                )\n1003\t            })?;\n1004\t\n1005\t        let shard_id = shard_for_key(pk_value, topology.shards);\n1006\t        shard_documents\n1007\t            .entry(shard_id)\n1008\t            .or_default()\n1009\t            .push(doc.clone());\n1010\t    }\n1011\t\n1012\t    Ok(shard_documents)\n1013\t}\n1014\t\n1015\t/// Build an error response from a node error.\n1016\tfn build_error_response(resp: WriteResponse) -> DocumentsWriteResponse {\n1017\t    DocumentsWriteResponse {\n1018\t        taskUid: resp.task_uid.map(|uid| uid.to_string()),\n1019\t        indexUid: None,\n1020\t        status: None,\n1021\t        error: resp.message,\n1022\t        error_type: resp.error_type,\n1023\t        code: resp.code,\n1024\t        link: None,\n1025\t    }\n1026\t}\n1027\t\n1028\t/// Build a success response with optional X-Miroir-Degraded header.\n1029\tfn build_response_with_degraded_header(\n1030\t    response: DocumentsWriteResponse,\n1031\t    degraded_groups: u32,\n1032\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n1033\t    let body = serde_json::to_string(&response).map_err(|e| {\n1034\t        MeilisearchError::new(\n1035\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n1036\t            format!(\"failed to serialize response: {}\", e),\n1037\t        )\n1038\t    })?;\n1039\t\n1040\t    let mut builder = Response::builder()\n1041\t        .status(StatusCode::OK)\n1042\t        .header(header::CONTENT_TYPE, \"application/json\");\n1043\t\n1044\t    // Add X-Miroir-Degraded header if any groups were degraded\n1045\t    if degraded_groups > 0 {\n1046\t        builder = builder.header(HEADER_MIROIR_DEGRADED, format!(\"groups={}\", degraded_groups));\n1047\t    }\n1048\t\n1049\t    Ok(builder\n1050\t        .body(axum::body::Body::from(body))\n1051\t        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n1052\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n1053\t            format!(\"failed to build response: {}\", e),\n1054\t        ))?)\n1055\t}\n1056\t\n1057\t/// Build an error response as JSON (for forwarded node errors).\n1058\tfn build_json_error_response(resp: DocumentsWriteResponse) -> Response {\n1059\t    (\n1060\t        StatusCode::OK,\n1061\t        [(header::CONTENT_TYPE, \"application/json\")],\n1062\t        Json(resp),\n1063\t    )\n1064\t        .into_response()\n1065\t}\n1066\t\n1067\t#[cfg(test)]\n1068\tmod tests {\n1069\t    use super::*;\n1070\t    use miroir_core::api_error::{MiroirCode, MeilisearchError};\n1071\t    use serde_json::json;\n1072\t\n1073\t    #[test]\n1074\t    fn test_extract_primary_key_common_fields() {\n1075\t        let doc_with_id = serde_json::json!({\"id\": \"test123\", \"name\": \"Test\"});\n1076\t        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc_with_id), Some(\"id\".to_string()));\n1077\t\n1078\t        let doc_with_pk = serde_json::json!({\"pk\": \"test456\", \"name\": \"Test\"});\n1079\t        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc_with_pk), Some(\"pk\".to_string()));\n1080\t\n1081\t        let doc_with_key = serde_json::json!({\"key\": \"test789\", \"name\": \"Test\"});\n1082\t        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc_with_key), Some(\"key\".to_string()));\n1083\t\n1084\t        let doc_with__id = serde_json::json!({\"_id\": \"test000\", \"name\": \"Test\"});\n1085\t        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc_with__id), Some(\"_id\".to_string()));\n1086\t    }\n1087\t\n1088\t    #[test]\n1089\t    fn test_extract_primary_key_no_common_field() {\n1090\t        let doc = serde_json::json!({\"name\": \"Test\", \"value\": 42});\n1091\t        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc),
